Yasmin Qureshi Contact details Please send all letters to: Yasmin Qureshi MP House of Commons LONDON SW1A 0AA Packages from courier companies should addressed to Yasmin Qureshi MP c/o CEVA Logistics, 40-48 Chase Road, London, NW10 6PX. . Please do not send post directly to the constituency office as it will take at least two days longer to reach me. . Please do not come to my constituency office in person without an appointment; my team is not able to see people who have not booked an appointment in advance.
